question: What are the 'Floating Islands of Aeridia' made of?

answers.ground_truth: The 'Floating Islands of Aeridia' are primarily composed of 'Aeridium Ore'.
answers.original: The Floating Islands of Aeridia are primarily composed of Aeridium Ore, which provides their buoyancy.

ops.description: Solar-Ribbons are used by Solarian Sun-Dancers as part of their cultural practices and can blind enemies or illuminate darkness.
The Zephyrian Storm-Engine harnesses Lightning Essence to amplify and stabilize energy output.
Aethelon's entertainment industry is also renowned for its historical epics.
Galaxy-Patterns can create or destroy entire star systems.

entities.name: Floating Islands of Aeridia
entities.description: The Floating Islands of Aeridia are natural landmasses that drift high above the world's surface in the upper atmosphere.<SEP>The Floating Islands of Aeridia are natural wonders on planet Ntulu, drifting high above the world's surface in the upper atmosphere.

entities.name: Aeridium Ore
entities.description: Aeridium Ore is a lightweight, crystalline mineral found only in atmospheric veins, providing buoyancy to the Floating Islands of Aeridia.<SEP>Aeridium Ore is a naturally buoyant, lightweight, and crystalline mineral found only in atmospheric veins on Ntulu.

entities.name: Ntulu
entities.description: Ntulu is a planet known for its natural wonders, including the Floating Islands of Aeridia.

relations.description: The Floating Islands of Aeridia are a natural wonder located on the planet Ntulu.
Large waterfalls cascade from the edges of some Floating Islands of Aeridia.

The Floating Islands of Aeridia are primarily composed of Aeridium Ore, which provides their buoyancy.<SEP>Aeridium Ore allows the Floating Islands of Aeridia to move slowly across the sky and is considered sacred by many cultures.<SEP>The Floating Islands of Aeridia are primarily composed of Aeridium Ore, which provides buoyancy.
Studies are ongoing to understand how Aeridium Ore retains buoyancy.
Aeridium Ore is extracted from atmospheric veins in the upper atmosphere.
The Floating Islands of Aeridia are home to unique airborne flora.
Airships are used to travel between the Floating Islands of Aeridia.

entities.name: Neural Augmentation
entities.description: Neural Augmentation is the enhancement of cognitive functions through the use of the Bio-Harmonizer implant.

entities.name: Glimmerwing Moth
entities.description: The Glimmerwing Moth is a specialized moth that feeds exclusively on the pollen of the Moonsilk Flower and has a lifespan of a single lunar cycle.

entities.name: Creators
entities.description: The Creators are the unknown individuals who designed the Chrono-Regulator.

entities.name: Bio-Harmonic Feedback Systems
entities.description: Bio-harmonic feedback systems are advanced technologies used by musicians on Harmonius to enhance the emotional depth of their compositions.<SEP>Bio-harmonic feedback systems are advanced technologies used by musicians to enhance the emotional depth of their compositions.
